step_rationale: Platelet-derived miR-126; regulates platelet activation and STEMI thrombus formation.
mechanism: miR-126 released from activated platelets modulates adhesion and aggregation, reflecting thrombotic MI burden.

references.title: Platelet microRNA for predicting acute myocardial infarction.

trials.title: Impact of Circulating miR-126 on Left Ventricular Remodeling and Clinical Outcomes in Patients Undergoing Primary Percutaneous Coronary Intervention. The PMIR-miR-126 Study.
